name: CompatibilityViolation
description: A system state does not meet a compatibility rule or supported combination.

name: ComplianceViolation
description: A system state fails an applicable technical or organizational control.

name: DependencyViolation
description: A required dependency is missing, unreachable, or unsuitable.

name: VersionViolation
description: An installed version falls outside an allowed or required version constraint.

name: LifecycleViolation
description: An entity is used outside its valid approval, servicing, or support lifecycle.

name: SecurityViolation
description: A state exposes a known vulnerability or fails a required security control.

name: PolicyViolation
description: A state contradicts an applicable enterprise policy.

name: ConflictViolation
description: Mutually incompatible components or settings coexist.

name: SupportabilityViolation
description: A configuration cannot receive the expected vendor-neutral operational support.

name: UpgradeViolation
description: A proposed or attempted upgrade does not meet readiness or sequencing constraints.
